name: alvz-packages
description: Registro publico de paquetes para Alvz Language

base-convert.name: base-convert
base-convert.description: Conversion de bases: binario, octal, hexadecimal
base-convert.author: Eder Alvarez

collections.name: collections
collections.description: Operaciones con listas: agrupar, ordenar, unique, aplanar
collections.author: Eder Alvarez

color-utils.name: color-utils
color-utils.description: Colores terminal ANSI: rojo, verde, azul, negrita, subrayado
color-utils.author: Eder Alvarez

crypto.name: crypto
crypto.description: Utilidades crypto: base64, hash simple, IDs, sanitizacion HTML
crypto.author: Eder Alvarez

csv-extra.name: csv-extra
csv-extra.description: CSV con tipos automaticos: parsear con deteccion de numeros
csv-extra.author: Eder Alvarez

date-utils.name: date-utils
date-utils.description: Calculos de fechas: sumar dias, diferencia, timestamp conversion
date-utils.author: Eder Alvarez

datos.name: datos
datos.description: Procesamiento tabular: CSV, filtrar, seleccionar columnas
datos.author: Eder Alvarez

file-utils.name: file-utils
file-utils.description: Operaciones avanzadas de archivos: glob, mover, temporales, directorios
file-utils.author: Eder Alvarez

fs-extra.name: fs-extra
fs-extra.description: Operaciones de archivos: leer directorios, copiar arboles
fs-extra.author: Eder Alvarez

html-utils.name: html-utils
html-utils.description: Generacion HTML: tablas, listas, enlaces, escape
html-utils.author: Eder Alvarez

ini-utils.name: ini-utils
ini-utils.description: Parseo INI: leer y generar archivos de configuracion
ini-utils.author: Eder Alvarez

json-utils.name: json-utils
json-utils.description: Utilidades JSON: merge, diff, patch, validar esquemas
json-utils.author: Eder Alvarez

markdown.name: markdown
markdown.description: Generacion Markdown: encabezados, listas, tablas, codigo
markdown.author: Eder Alvarez

math.name: math
math.description: Funciones matematicas avanzadas: fibonacci, primos, combinatoria
math.author: Eder Alvarez

math-extra.name: math-extra
math-extra.description: Matematicas adicionales: MCD, MCM, factorial, permutaciones, par/impar
math-extra.author: Eder Alvarez

path-utils.name: path-utils
path-utils.description: Manipulacion de rutas: join, dirname, basename, extension
path-utils.author: Eder Alvarez

random-utils.name: random-utils
random-utils.description: Utilidades aleatorias: choice, shuffle, sample, weighted choice
random-utils.author: Eder Alvarez

retry.name: retry
retry.description: Reintentos con backoff: ejecutar, respaldo, condicional
retry.author: Eder Alvarez

slugify.name: slugify
slugify.description: Generacion de slugs URL a partir de textos
slugify.author: Eder Alvarez

stats.name: stats
stats.description: Estadisticas: media, mediana, moda, varianza, desviacion, min/max
stats.author: Eder Alvarez

strings.name: strings
strings.description: Manipulacion de textos: invertir, capitalizar, palindromos, snake_case
strings.author: Eder Alvarez

text-utils.name: text-utils
text-utils.description: Utilidades de texto: wrap, indent, center, tabular
text-utils.author: Eder Alvarez

throttle.name: throttle
throttle.description: Rate limiting: throttle, espera, rate limiter
throttle.author: Eder Alvarez

tiempo.name: tiempo
tiempo.description: Formateo de fecha/hora: timestamps, bisiestos, dias entre fechas
tiempo.author: Eder Alvarez

unit-convert.name: unit-convert
unit-convert.description: Conversion de unidades: temperatura, distancia, peso, volumen
unit-convert.author: Eder Alvarez

validacion.name: validacion
validacion.description: Validacion de datos: email, telefono, URL, rangos, longitud
validacion.author: Eder Alvarez

yaml-utils.name: yaml-utils
yaml-utils.description: Serializacion YAML: diccionarios y listas a YAML
yaml-utils.author: Eder Alvarez
